query: SELECT id, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(itemData, '$.category')) AS category, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(itemData, '$.qty')) AS qty, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(itemData, '$.unitPrice')) AS unitPrice, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(itemData, '$.totalPrice')) AS totalPrice FROM cartItems ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 20;
